verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a song in my heart today, Something I never had; Jesus has taken my sins away, Oh say, but I'm glad.

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines: Wonderful, marvelous Love He brings, Into a heart that's sad; Through darkest tunnels The soul just sings, Oh say, but I'm glad.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We have a fellowship Rich and sweet, Tongues can never relate; Abiding in Him is a real treat, Oh say, but I'm glad.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Won't you come to Him With all your care, Weary and worn and sad? You too, will sing As His love you share. Oh say, but I'm glad.
